summary: The implementation successfully addresses both requirements. A new MeeshoProductSection component was created displaying the exact image file (ms_dxrpu_512_613389026.jpg) with clickable redirect to the complete Meesho affiliate URL. The component was integrated into ProductBrowse.tsx below existing sections with proper image loading states, hover effects, and responsive design following existing patterns.

hallucinated_features.description: Added 'Look Out →' hover overlay text on the clickable image
hallucinated_features.reason: The hover overlay with text was not requested in the BuildRequest. Only visual affordance (hover effect or cursor change) was required per REQ-2 acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Added scale transform animation on hover (hover:scale-[1.02])
hallucinated_features.reason: While visual affordance was required, the specific scale animation was not requested. However, this reasonably fulfills the 'hover effect' acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Included unused PromotionalImage component in ProductBrowse.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: A PromotionalImage component was added to ProductBrowse.tsx but is not used anywhere in the render output. This appears to be leftover code.
